kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Get Computer Data
Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

Log the computer data.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: {'ACE': {'introduced': '-', 'discontinued': '-', 'company': '-'}, 'AN/FSQ-32': {'introduced': '01 Jan 1960', 'discontinued': '-', 'company': 'IBM'}, 'AN/FSQ-7': {'introduced': '01 Jan 1958', 'discontinued': '-', 'company': 'IBM'}, 'APEXC': {'introduced': '-', 'discontinued': '-', 'company': '-'}, 'ARRA': {'introduced': '-', 'discontinued': '-', 'company': '-'}, 'ASCI Blue Mountain': {'introduced': '-', 'discontinued': '-', 'company': '-'}, 'ASCI Blue Pacific': {'introduced': '01 Jan 1998', 'discontinued': '-', 'company': 'IBM'}, 'ASCI Purple': {'introduced': '01 Jan 2005', 'discontinued': '-', 'company': 'IBM'}, 'ASCI Red': {'introduced': '-', 'discontinued': '-', 'company': '-'}, 'ASCI Thors Hammer': {'introduced': '-', 'discontinued': '-', 'company': '-'}}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

test.doc: Scraped computer data from the website and loging it as a nested dictionary.

kw.doc: Returns contents of the ``string`` after the last occurrence of ``marker``.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Click Start Button And Stop Button At 75Percent
Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` contains ``text``.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
